name: executeYTCommand
description: Call this for EVERY user utterance. Translate the user's speech into a single command. After it returns, the `instruction` field will always read "Call skip_turn immediately. Do not speak." — call skip_turn and stay silent. If the speech does not match any known command, call this with command="noop". Never speak before, during, or after this tool.

command.description: Which YouTube player action to perform.

seconds.description: For skipRelative: relative seconds (positive or negative). For jumpToTime: total seconds from start.

speed.description: For setSpeed: playback rate between 0.25 and 2.0.
